---
title: "Exploring Storms"
author: "Michelle Liu"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

```{r}
#| label: storms-plot
storms |>
  filter(status %in% c("TD", "TS", "H")) |>
  group_by(year, status) |>
  summarise(n_storms = n_distinct(name), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(status = factor(status, 
    levels = c("TD", "TS", "H"),
    labels = c("Tropical Depression", "Tropical Storm", "Hurricane"))) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n_storms, fill = status)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.8, position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Tropical Depression" = "#ADD8E6", 
               "Tropical Storm" = "#FFA500", 
               "Hurricane" = "#8B0000"),
    name = "Storm Type"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Storms per Year by Type",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
